programme.title: Borderforce: America's Gatekeepers

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: The team is driving to Kalgoorlie, the gold-mining capital of Australia, to salvage a 10-tonne gold dry-blower that has been sitting idle for months and is costing its owner hundreds of thousands of dollars in lost revenue. With the price of gold skyrocketing, the owner wants to get the blower repaired and back out onto the goldfields, but it is stuck in the middle of nowhere. The team has one day and a budget of $20,000 to retrieve the money-making gold machine.

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: Stephen Fry faces the grilling of a lifetime from a cast of autistic and learning-disabled interviewers. Did he take drugs in Buckingham Palace? Is he happy to be alive? From the moment he enters the room, nothing is off limits. As the questions come thick and fast, Fry is pushed beyond wit and wordplay into something more personal, opening up about mental health, shame and self-criticism.

programme.title: WhatsApp Obsession: The Murder of Stephanie Hansen
programme.desc: On the 30th of December, 2022, 39-year-old Stephanie Hansen was brutally stabbed to death in her London home - her housemate and friend Sheldon Rodrigues initially appeared grief-stricken, yet behind his facade lay a chilling obsession. In the months before Stephanie's death, Rodrigues planted secret cameras and recording devices in their home and bombarded her with coercive WhatsApp messages - when Steph began a new relationship, his jealousy turned deadly. Through exclusive access to police bodycam footage, WhatsApp records and court evidence, this film reveals how the Metropolitan Police exposed Rodrigues' lies and uncovered the disturbing level of surveillance Steph was subjected to - featuring interviews with Steph's family, friends and the detectives who investigated the case, this powerful documentary unravels a story of obsession, control, and the ultimate betrayal.
